version_description: The ACTUAL chords "sus4", "m7", etc...of this song as well as every single chord change are composed just for you, from me.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Tabs by "Pierce The Vegan" and Beverly Valley (same person) on YouTube: 
Pierce The Vegan - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC3c-1ZDochB5sX-EMVW4PxQ
Beverly Valley - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCb75kwZnHUZ9O7YzbRxzCpA       


       (This chord tab contains the actual chords "sus4", "m7", etc...of this song as well as 
    every single chord change - I worked very hard and produced it all just for you - I hope you enjoy.


TUNING: STANDARD, NO CAPO AT ALL, LIKE, FOR REAL

[Intro]
[ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]      
[ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                                    [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
Midnight, you come and pick me up, no headlights.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                                         [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
Long drive, could end in burning flames or paradise[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bm[/ch]                                                 [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
Fade into view, oh, it's been a while since I have even heard from you. (Heard from you.)[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                                    [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]                               
I should just tell you to leave cause I know exactly where it leads,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
But I watch it go round and round each time.[/tab]



[Chorus]  
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]                                        [ch]Asus4[/ch]      [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
You got that James Dean daydream look in your eye and I got that red lip, classic thing that you like.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Asus4[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]                                                [ch]Asus4[/ch]    [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
And when we go crashing down, we come back every time 'cause we never go out of style, [/tab]

We never go out of style.
[tab]       [ch]Asus4[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]                                       [ch]Asus4[/ch]      [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
You've got that long hair slick back, white t-shirt and I got that good girl faith and a tight little skirt[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Asus4[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]            
And when we go crashing down, we come back every time [/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Asus4[/ch]    [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]                                   [ch]Asus4[/ch]
'Cause we never go out of style, we never go out of style.[/tab]



[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                                      [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]                                   
So it goes, he can't keep his wild eyes on the road.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                                        [ch]Gmaj7[/ch] 
Takes me home, lights are off he's taking off his coat. Mmmm, yeah.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm[/ch]                                                     [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
I say, "I heard (oh!) That you've been out and about with some other girl." Some other girl.[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus 2]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                                      [ch]Dmaj7[/ch] 
He says, "What you've heard is true but I can't stop thinking about you and I."[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
    I said, "I've been there, too, a few times." Tee hee.[/tab]



[Chorus 2]
[tab]                    [ch]D[/ch]                                        [ch]Asus4[/ch]      [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
'Cause you got that James Dean daydream look in your eye and I got that red lip, classic thing that you like.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Asus4[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]                                                [ch]Asus4[/ch]   [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
And when we go crashing down, we come back every time 'cause we never go out of style, [/tab]

We never go out of style.
[tab]       [ch]Asus4[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]                                       [ch]Asus4[/ch]      [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
You've got that long hair slick back, white t-shirt and I got that good girl faith and a tight little skirt[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Asus4[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]            
And when we go crashing down, we come back every time [/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Asus4[/ch]    [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]                                  
'Cause we never go out of style, we never go out of style.[/tab]



[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Asus4[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Asus4[/ch]   [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]            [ch]Asus4[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]Asus4[/ch]        [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
Take me home! Just take me home! Yeah, just take me home! Hoo ohh hoo whaa uh ah, ah ah aaaaaahhhn.[/tab]

(Out of style!)



[Chorus 3]
[tab]            [ch]Asus4[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]                                        [ch]Asus4[/ch]      [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
'Cause, you got that James Dean daydream look in your eye and I got that red lip, classic thing that you like.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Asus4[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]                                               [ch]Asus4[/ch]    [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
And when we go crashing down, we come back every time 'cause we never go out of style, [/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Asus4[/ch]
We never go out of style![/tab]
